Notes: External accessory, NOT placed on PCB. Free-space adhesive FPC antenna for a PLASTIC enclosure, single-band 2.4GHz, 53mm U.FL/MHF1 lead, 1.1dBi (within module's <=2.33dBi cert envelope). Needs keep-out from metal/ground (opposite of a metal-surface antenna). Terminates in U.FL, so it does NOT mate U1 directly - requires ADPT1 (MHF III->U.FL). Higher-gain/longer alt: FXP73.07.0100A (100mm, 2.5dBi, 931-1076-ND).

Adapter cable: I-PEX MHF III / W.FL PLUG (mates U1's on-module MHF III jack) on one end, U.FL / IPEX MHF1 JACK on the other (accepts ANT1's U.FL plug). NOT stocked by DigiKey/LCSC - order from an RF pigtail vendor (Data Alliance, superbatrf, eteily) or AliExpress. Keep ~50mm to limit total length. ~0.3dB loss per junction. Only needed because U1 is MHF III and ANT1 is U.FL; a native-MHF III antenna would remove this part (but is special-order, MOQ/lead).
